text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I catch sight Vodka while walking through the
hallway.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... Geez, I can't get it out of my head.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer... Listen to this. Scarlet and I went to
see a movie on our day off.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The movie we chose ended up being a, uh,
r-romance movie... The characters were all over
each other the whole time.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
This one scene keeps replayin' in my head to the
point where I could barely even sleep. Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
W-well, y'know... Th-they start dating and then
they uh... k-ki...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Aughhh! Why can't I just say it?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka suddenly pinches her nose like she's got a
nosebleed, and runs off somewhere.
